content_body: I was a bit nervous about booking with Georgia Cabin Rentals at first because I was having issues with the company's Right Signature to confirm my reservation. But speaking to the employees on the phone set me at ease and it was all eventually figured out. From that point on everything went smoothly. The app was cool, so all of the cabin details were at my fingertips and I didn't have to carry around a folder of papers. And the cabin was great. Clean, and comfortable with not too many trinkets laying around yet all of the comforts of home. Plus an awesome creek to enjoy behind the house as well as a huge yard. Our only issue was that we had no cell reception at all at the cabin and we had to be accessible in case there was an issue at work. We ended up buying a microcell from the local AT&T store (by the way, Steve here was awesome!) for $300 and plugging it into the wifi at the house. It took about an hour to set up and then we had perfect cell service for the remainder of our time at the cabin. Also, there was ample parking at the cabin; and it was only a short drive away from Blue Ridge and lots of things to see and do in the area. I highly recommend Crooked Creek Cabin to anyone looking for a peaceful getaway.
title: Peaceful Getaway To The Blue Ridge Mountains
